title: BrdU Cell Proliferation Assay Protocol for Tetrahymena thermophila
author: Perc, Valentina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This standard operating procedure (SOP) describes the protocol for measuring the viability of unicellular organism  Tetrahymena thermophila  treated with plastic and metal micro- and nanoparticles using the BrdU Cell Proliferation assay.
steps_raw: This standard operating procedure (SOP) describes the protocol for measuring the viability of unicellular organism  Tetrahymena thermophila  treated with plastic and metal micro- and nanoparticles using the BrdU Cell Proliferation assay.
